moduleInterfaces.purpose: Own credential collection, client-side validation, and rendering of the declared session result.

publicSurfaces.name: LoginForm.submit
publicSurfaces.description: Submits credential input and delegates authentication through the declared auth login contract.

inputs.name: credentials.email
inputs.description: User email address collected by the login form.

inputs.name: credentials.password
inputs.description: User password collected by the login form.

errors.when: The auth service rejects the credential payload.
errors.handling: Surface the declared auth error state; do not infer fallback session behavior.

imports.allowedUse: Submit credential payload and consume declared session result only.

moduleInterfaces.purpose: Own login request validation and session issuance behind the OpenAPI contract.

publicSurfaces.name: POST /auth/login
publicSurfaces.description: Authenticates credentials and returns the declared session response.

inputs.name: request.body.email
inputs.description: Email value from the auth UI.

inputs.name: request.body.password
inputs.description: Password value from the auth UI.

outputs.name: 200.session
outputs.description: Authenticated session payload defined by the OpenAPI contract.

errors.when: Credentials are syntactically valid but authentication fails.
errors.handling: Return the declared error response; do not issue partial sessions or fallback identities.
